name: davinci-sdk
description: Reference for the Vocdoni Davinci SDK (@vocdoni/davinci-sdk): the high-level DavinciSDK facade for the zk-based voting protocol — create a process, cast encrypted (ElGamal + zk-SNARK) votes, build any census (Merkle/dynamic/CSP/on-chain), configure ballot modes, drive lifecycle, and read results. Includes per-topic references, protocol grounding, and copy-pasteable runnable recipes for the full create-process → encrypted-vote → results flow.
